script: echo '===== yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh contents =====' && cat /home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '===== Get token + check user identity =====' && TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh 2>&1); RC=$?; echo "token-script-rc=$RC token-len=${#TOKEN}" && if [ $RC -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '{displayName, userPrincipalName, id}'; fi && echo && echo '===== Read current manifest id from zip =====' && MID=$(unzip -p /home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/aixa-teams-app.zip manifest.json | jq -r '.id'); echo "manifest.id = $MID" && echo && echo '===== Check if Aixa app already in catalog =====' && if [ -n "$TOKEN" ] && [ -n "$MID" ]; then curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=externalId%20eq%20%27$MID%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '{count: (.value|length), entries: [.value[] | {id, externalId, displayName, distributionMethod}]}'; fi
